query:
OK.. back to the eval report.  I have removed the 48 session-outcome entries: # Unimatrix Eval Report

     Generated: 1774699934 (unix epoch) | Scenarios: 3977

     ## 1. Summary

     | Profile | Scenarios | P@K | MRR | CC@k | ICD (max=ln(n)) | Avg
     Latency (ms) | ΔP@K | ΔMRR | ΔCC@k | ΔICD | ΔLatency (ms) |
     |---------|-----------|-----|-----|------|----------------|------
     -----------|------|------|--------|------|---------------|
     | baseline | 3977 | 0.2880 | 0.4080 | 0.2671 | 0.5390 | 9.7 | — |
      — | — | — | — |
     | pre-col031 | 3977 | 0.2880 | 0.4080 | 0.2671 | 0.5390 | 9.9 | —
      | — | — | — | +0.1 |

     ## 2. Notable Ranking Changes

     ### qlog-1013

     **Query**: yes.  proceed
     **Kendall τ**: 0.0000

     | Rank | Baseline Entry | Candidate Entry |
     |------|---------------|-----------------|

     ### qlog-1034

     **Query**: accept
     **Kendall τ**: 0.0000

     | Rank | Baseline Entry | Candidate Entry |
     |------|---------------|-----------------|

     ### qlog-1035

     **Query**: we are ready to begin delivery protcol for nxs-011
     **Kendall τ**: 0.0000

     | Rank | Baseline Entry | Candidate Entry |
     |------|---------------|-----------------|

     ### qlog-104

     **Query**: vnc-011 deterministic example selection retrospective
     module
     **Kendall τ**: 0.0000

     | Rank | Baseline Entry | Candidate Entry |
     |------|---------------|-----------------|

     ### qlog-105

     **Query**: just ran retrospective on vnc-011, and col-020b before
      that... the data it found for those 2 latest features was
     EXTREMElY sparce, where col-020, was chock full.  I blieeve it
     may be possible that something in col-020b may have corrupted the
      full data flow driving our retro analysis.  I don't believe with
      the size and scope of vnc-011 for example, this was all the data
      there is: RETROSPECTIVE COMPLETE — Knowledge base updated.






       Feature: vnc-011


       PR: #197 (merged)





       Retrospective summary:


       - Sessions: 1, Tool calls: 11 (primary agent only — subagents
     did the work), Duration: 1h 50m
       - Hotspots: 0
       - Baseline outliers: 0

       Knowledge extracted:
       - Patterns: 1 new (#949 — Domain-Specific Markdown Formatter
     Module Pattern)
       - Procedures: 0
       - Lessons: 1 new (#953 — Human overrides must propagate to ALL
     downstream artifacts)
       - ADRs stored: 3 (#950 format-dependent evidence_limit, #951
     deterministic selection, #952 separate module)
       - ADRs validated: 2 (ADR-002, ADR-003)
       - ADRs with caveats: 1 (ADR-001 — file text says unwrap_or(0),
     shipped code correctly uses unwrap_or(3) per human override)

       Gate 3a lesson: Pseudocode agents consumed stale ADR text that
     predated the human override. The implementation brief had the
     correct value, but agents prioritized architecture
       artifacts. Future mitigation: ensure human overrides are
     explicitly noted in ALL artifacts agents will read, not just the
     brief.
     **Kendall τ**: 0.0000

     | Rank | Baseline Entry | Candidate Entry |
     |------|---------------|-----------------|

     ### qlog-1056

     **Query**: now run retro for nxs-011
     **Kendall τ**: 0.0000

     | Rank | Baseline Entry | Candidate Entry |
     |------|---------------|-----------------|

     ### qlog-1060

     **Query**: that needs to be a gh issue pls.  I don't run into
     this often, as nxs-011 was one of the largest features we've
     implemented
     **Kendall τ**: 0.0000

     | Rank | Baseline Entry | Candidate Entry |
     |------|---------------|-----------------|

     ### qlog-1061

     **Query**: OK.. we've just completed WO-1 (nxs-011) from
     @product/PRODUCT-VISION.md .  Please mark this as complete.  Now
     its time to begin design on WO-2.  Select the appropriate prefix,
      select the next number, and lets begin design on this feature
     **Kendall τ**: 0.0000

     | Rank | Baseline Entry | Candidate Entry |
     |------|---------------|-----------------|

     ### qlog-1071

     **Query**: run retro for nxs-011
     **Kendall τ**: 0.0000
